message:
fix(lease-coordinator): prevent u64 wraparound in weighted scoring and clamp zero quorum threshold

Two correctness fixes:

1. Zero-threshold clamp: threshold_for_tier() could return 0 when all
   thresholds configured to zero, effectively disabling quorum. Add
   .max(1) clamp to enforce minimum threshold of 1.
2. Overflow-safe weighted selection: best_score was u64; wrapping_mul
   of u64 hash by u64 weight could produce lower score for high-weight
   candidates due to wraparound. Change to u128 arithmetic:
   u128::from(hash) * u128::from(candidate.weight.max(1))

Add tests: zero_threshold_configuration_fails_closed and
higher_weight_beats_wraparound_artifact.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
